# NetworkLocation

A location referenced relative to a transport network element.

## Specializations of NetworkLocation

| Class | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [Linear Location](LinearLocation.md) | A location referenced along a network element using measure values. |

## Formalization for NetworkLocation

| Property | Constraint |
|----------|------------|
| [hasNetworkElement](../properties/hasNetworkElement/) | exactly 1 [cdm3:NetworkElement](https://w3id.org/citydata/part3/v1/NetworkElement) |
| subClassOf | [Location](../Location/) |
